indications.text:
ALPHAGAN® (brimonidine tartrate ophthalmic solution) 0.2% is indicated for lowering
intraocular pressure (IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.
The IOP lowering efficacy of ALPHAGAN® diminishes over time in some patients. This loss of
effect appears with a variable time o...


ALPHAGAN 0.5% is indicated for the prevention of post-operative IOP elevations in patients
undergoing argon laser trabeculoplasty (ALT).
